Name: DMRE ASM Programme – Gold Batch #001 – Johannesburg West – 28.4 g Au
Description: 28.4 g alluvial and reef gold (purity 92.5% Au) by registered small-scale miner under DMRE's formalization programme, Johannesburg West old workings area. DMRE ASM licence DMRE-ASM-2025-0034. Mercury-free cyanide leaching via 4-drum mini-plant. SARS mineral royalty receipt ROY-AUG-2025-0034.

Name: DMRE ASM Programme – Gold Batch #002 – Welkom Free State – 85.2 g Au
Description: 85.2 g gold from formalized small-scale reef mining at Welkom legacy mine area (Free State). DMRE-ASM-2025-0045. Cyanide leaching, gravity recovery, purity 91.8% Au. Delivered to Rand Refinery under community small-scale miner agreement. SARS royalty receipt ROY-AUG-2025-0045.

Name: DMRE ASM Programme – Gold Batch #003 – Barberton Mpumalanga – 46.7 g Au
Description: 46.7 g gold (purity 89.4% Au) from Barberton greenstone belt, formalized small-scale miner. DMRE-ASM-2025-0056. Mini-plant gravity and cyanide leach. Rand Refinery delivery. SARS mineral royalty receipt ROY-AUG-2025-0056. DFFE environmental compliance DFFE-EMR-2025-0034.

Name: DMRE ASM Programme – Gold Batch #004 – Pilgrim's Rest Heritage Area – 31.2 g Au
Description: 31.2 g gold from Pilgrim's Rest Heritage Gold Mine (formalized legacy artisanal area, Mpumalanga). DMRE-ASM-2025-0067. Monitored small-scale permit for tourist and heritage mine. Purity 93.1% Au. SARS royalty ROY-AUG-2025-0067. SAHRA heritage compliance attached.

Name: DMRE ASM Programme – Gold Batch #005 – Kalgold North West – 52.8 g Au
Description: 52.8 g gold from Kalgold area (North West Province) formalized small-scale workings. DMRE-ASM-2025-0078. Purity 90.6% Au. Gravity concentration and cyanide leach. Rand Refinery tender. SARS royalty ROY-AUG-2025-0078. Water use licence Department of Water & Sanitation NW-WUL-2025-0034.

Name: DMRE ASM Programme – Gold Batch #006 – Odendaalsrus Tailings – 68.5 g Au
Description: 68.5 g gold recovered from licensed tailings re-treatment operation in Odendaalsrus (Free State goldfields). DMRE-ASM-2025-0089. Modern cyanide-leach tailings retreatment. Purity 94.2% Au. Rand Refinery delivery note RR-2025-0045. SARS royalty ROY-AUG-2025-0089.

Name: DMRE ASM Programme – Gold Batch #007 – Gauteng West Rand Legacy Area – 38.9 g Au
Description: 38.9 g gold from West Rand (Randfontein) old mine area, formalized small-scale permit. DMRE-ASM-2025-0101. Purity 92.4% Au. DFFE environmental compliance. SARS royalty ROY-AUG-2025-0101. Women's mining cooperative (8 members) right holders.

Name: DMRE ASM Programme – Gold Batch #008 – Barberton Heritage Mine Batch 2 – 41.1 g Au
Description: 41.1 g gold from second Barberton batch, small-scale formalized miner. DMRE-ASM-2025-0112. Purity 91.2% Au. Gravity + cyanide leach. Rand Refinery delivery RR-2025-0056. SARS royalty ROY-AUG-2025-0112. DFFE EMR-2025-0045.

Name: DMRE ASM Programme – Gold Batch #009 – Welkom Free State Tailings Batch 2 – 112.4 g Au
Description: 112.4 g gold from Welkom large tailings retreatment project (cooperative of 15 licensed small-scale miners). DMRE-ASM-2025-0123. CIL tailings retreatment. Purity 93.8% Au. Rand Refinery delivery RR-2025-0067. SARS royalty ROY-AUG-2025-0123. DFFE monitoring.

Name: DMRE ASM Programme – Gold Batch #010 – Kalgold Batch 2 – 59.3 g Au
Description: 59.3 g gold from Kalgold second batch, formalized North West small-scale miners. DMRE-ASM-2025-0134. Purity 91.5% Au. Rand Refinery RR-2025-0078. SARS royalty ROY-AUG-2025-0134. DWS WUL NW-WUL-2025-0056. DFFE EMR-2025-0056.

Name: DMRE ASM Programme – PGM Batch #001 – Rustenburg Pillar Recovery – 18.4 g 4E
Description: 18.4 g 4E PGM (platinum, palladium, rhodium, gold) recovered from licensed pillar and remnant mining at Rustenburg, North West Province. DMRE small-scale PGM licence SMML-NW-2025-0034. Delivered to Impala Platinum under approved community purchase agreement CPA-2025-0034. SARS royalty ROY-PGM-2025-0034.

Name: DMRE ASM Programme – PGM Batch #002 – Bafokeng Community Mine – 34.7 g 4E
Description: 34.7 g 4E PGM from Bafokeng community small-scale mining licence area, North West Province. DMRE SMML-NW-2025-0045. Assay by Mintek: Pt 68%, Pd 21%, Rh 6%, Au 5%. Royal Bafokeng Platinum approved community purchase CPA-2025-0045. SARS royalty ROY-PGM-2025-0045.

Name: DMRE ASM Programme – PGM Batch #003 – Limpopo PGM Area Potgietersrus – 22.1 g 4E
Description: 22.1 g 4E PGM from licensed Potgietersrus (Mokopane) small-scale PGM mining in Limpopo. DMRE SMML-LIM-2025-0034. Palladium-dominant ore. Anglo American approved community purchase. SARS royalty ROY-PGM-2025-0056. DFFE EMR-2025-0067.

Name: DMRE ASM Programme – PGM Batch #004 – Rustenburg Tailings Recovery – 41.8 g 4E
Description: 41.8 g 4E PGM from Rustenburg old mine tailings retreatment cooperative (licensed). DMRE SMML-NW-2025-0056. Ultra-fine gravity and flotation. Impala Platinum community purchase CPA-2025-0056. SARS royalty ROY-PGM-2025-0067. Rehabilitation deposit ZAR 12,000 paid.

Name: DMRE ASM Programme – PGM Batch #005 – Bafokeng Community Mine Batch 2 – 58.2 g 4E
Description: 58.2 g 4E PGM from second batch Bafokeng small-scale community mine. DMRE SMML-NW-2025-0067. Mintek assay: Pt 71%, Pd 19%, Rh 5%, Au 5%. Royal Bafokeng Platinum CPA-2025-0067. SARS royalty ROY-PGM-2025-0078.

Name: DMRE ASM Programme – PGM Batch #006 – Potgietersrus Batch 2 – 28.9 g 4E
Description: 28.9 g 4E PGM from second Potgietersrus batch. DMRE SMML-LIM-2025-0045. Palladium-rich Platreef ore. Anglo American purchase CPA-LIM-2025-0045. SARS royalty ROY-PGM-2025-0089. DFFE EMR-2025-0089.

Name: DMRE ASM Programme – PGM Batch #007 – Rustenburg Women's Cooperative – 36.4 g 4E
Description: 36.4 g 4E PGM from licensed Rustenburg women's mining cooperative (12 members). DMRE SMML-NW-2025-0078. Pillar recovery. Impala purchase CPA-2025-0078. SARS royalty ROY-PGM-2025-0101. DFFE EMR-2025-0101. Social development report submitted to DMRE.

Name: DMRE ASM Programme – PGM Batch #008 – Limpopo Platreef Cooperative – 51.7 g 4E
Description: 51.7 g 4E PGM from Limpopo Platreef small-scale licence area, 18-member cooperative. DMRE SMML-LIM-2025-0056. Ivanhoe Mines tolling agreement. SARS royalty ROY-PGM-2025-0112. DFFE EMR-2025-0112. Mintek assay Pt 55%, Pd 28%, Ni 8%, Cu 4%, Rh 3%, Au 2%.

Name: DMRE Small-Scale Mining Licence – Rustenburg Block RST-ASM-001 – 1.8 ha PGM
Description: DMRE registered small-scale mining licence RST-ASM-001, Rustenburg, North West. 1.8 ha. Minerals: PGM (Merensky and UG2 reef). DMRE licence SMML-NW-2025-0034. Environmental authorisation (EA) from DFFE-EA-2025-0034. Water use licence DWS-WUL-2025-0045. Community social and labour plan submitted.

Name: DMRE Small-Scale Mining Licence – Welkom Block WLK-ASM-001 – 0.9 ha Gold
Description: DMRE SSMPA registered block WLK-ASM-001, Welkom, Free State. 0.9 ha. Minerals: gold (reef and tailings). DMRE licence SMML-FS-2025-0034. DFFE-EA-2025-0045. DWS-WUL-2025-0056. Women's cooperative (12 members) registered as licensees. Social development plan.

Name: DMRE Small-Scale Mining Licence – Barberton Block BBT-ASM-001 – 1.2 ha Gold
Description: DMRE SSMPA block BBT-ASM-001, Barberton greenstone belt, Mpumalanga. 1.2 ha. Minerals: gold (vein/lode). DMRE SMML-MP-2025-0034. DFFE-EA-2025-0056. Heritage area permit SAHRA-HA-2025-0012. DWS-WUL-2025-0067. Environmental management plan approved.

Name: DMRE Small-Scale Mining Licence – Potgietersrus Block PTR-ASM-001 – 2.1 ha PGM
Description: DMRE SSMPA licence PTR-ASM-001, Potgietersrus/Mokopane, Limpopo. 2.1 ha Platreef PGM ore. DMRE SMML-LIM-2025-0034. DFFE-EA-2025-0067. DWS-WUL-2025-0078. Social and labour plan, community benefit agreement with Mokopane Traditional Council. DFFE EMR monitoring.

Name: SARS Mineral Royalty – Gold Q1 2025 – ZAR 28,420
Description: SARS mineral royalty for Q1 2025 gold production by DMRE SSMPA licensees. Royalty rate 0.5% (MPRDA refined rate for gold). Computed on 484.3g gold gross sales at LME. SARS receipt MR-AU-2025-Q1-0034. Covers batches #001 and #002. Amount: ZAR 28,420.

Name: SARS Mineral Royalty – PGM Q1 2025 – ZAR 12,180
Description: SARS mineral royalty for Q1 2025 PGM production. Royalty rate 0.5% unrefined PGM (MPRDA). Computed on 53.1g 4E at LME. SARS receipt MR-PGM-2025-Q1-0034. Covers batches #001 and #002. Amount: ZAR 12,180.

Name: SARS Mineral Royalty – Gold & PGM Q3 2025 – ZAR 58,640
Description: SARS mineral royalty Q3 2025, gold and PGM combined. Gold royalty 0.5% (394.4g) = ZAR 35,180. PGM royalty 0.5% (156.6g 4E) = ZAR 23,460. Total ZAR 58,640. SARS receipt MR-COMB-2025-Q3-0045. MPRDA compliance certificate attached.
